name: dotnet-reflect
description: Inspect the API surface of any .NET NuGet package or assembly — exact signatures with nullability, XML-doc summaries, decompiled method bodies, reverse find-usages (who calls a symbol, from IL, with file:line), and version diffs — read straight from the DLL on disk. Seven one-command scripts: surface, find, find-usages, decompile, diff, cache, bindir.
